summary.authoritative_rule: the current add blocker has shifted from local shape to day-level selection authority; broader promotion stays blocked until that layer is understood

triage_rows.rationale: the best local full-quality add object is still valid inside the local permission hierarchy
the residual non-seed hits are displaced or late-echo counterfactuals, so portability still fails even after local shape and burst moderation are strong
the remaining blocker is no longer local shape; it is whether the branch can justify same-day symbol selection and no-order-day counterfactual promotion

interpretation: V1.34FO turns the counterfactual audit into a governance verdict for the add frontier.

The add branch should stop trying to widen its strongest local module with more local shape tweaks and instead study the missing day-level selection authority that separates real add permission from displaced or late-echo counterfactuals.
